title: Vanilla Plus+++
description: A culmination of a variety of mods to give the vanilla experience a step-up while maintaining core concepts.
body:
Vanilla Minecraft, made to run better and look better, with a plethora of new content to explore.

Build your structures faster and more detailed than ever before! Enjoy many new mobs changes to spice up gameplay! Encounter detailed structures scattered across the land! Craft the ultimate set of tools with heaps of new enchantments.

This world is yours to claim, shape it to your will!


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This modpack does make the game considerably easier in many aspects. The main goal is to speed up redundancies as well as provide varied content, while also providing many optional things to acquire/do. Creativity boosted!

</details>

Multiplayer supported (and encouraged!)
